entry.title: Re: Error "Date type EPICK is not valid" during creation...
entry.content:
Under IMG >> SCM Extended Warehouse Management >> EWM >> Cross Process settings >> Delivery Warehouse Request >> Date/Times 

go for this profile /SCWM/OUT_PRD_DLV_KTS_KTR then untick EPICK to make it active

entry.title: Re: Using table alias in order by of window expressions - ABAP open SQL
entry.content:
Hi,

Try some like this.

  WITH 
    +table1 AS (
	SELECT
       p~laufd,      " Run Date
       p~laufi,      " Run ID
       chect,        " Check number
       p~zbukr,      " Company code
       pridt,        " Check date
       p~lifnr,      " Vendor code
       p~kunnr,      " Customer
       rp~belnr,     " Document number
       rp~bldat,     " Document date
       p~rwbtr,      " Check amount
       b~sgtxt,      " Item Text
       rp~waers,     " Currency
       p~voidd,      " Voided Check Date
       rp~shkzg,     " Debit/Credit Indicator
       p~vblnr,      " Payment Document Number
       zwels,
       p~hbkid,
       p~hktid,
       p~rzawe,
       text2,
       xblnr,
       rp~zfbdt,
       rp~zbd1t,
       rp~zbd2t,
       rp~zbd3t,
       rp~dmbtr,
       zpstl,
       zort1,
       zstra,
       zpfac,
       landx,
       bezei,
       xbanc,
       bancd,
	   a~belnr AS belnr_aux,
	   a~rbukrs AS rbukrs_aux,
	   a~gjahr AS gjahr_aux,
	   a~ebeln AS ebeln_aux
    FROM payr AS p
    INNER JOIN regup AS rp
      ON  p~laufd = rp~laufd
      AND p~laufi = rp~laufi
      AND p~lifnr = rp~lifnr
      AND p~kunnr = rp~kunnr
      AND p~vblnr = rp~vblnr
    INNER JOIN bseg AS b
      ON  rp~belnr = b~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = b~bukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = b~gjahr
      AND rp~buzei = b~buzei
    INNER JOIN t042zt AS t
      ON  t~zlsch = p~rzawe
      AND t~spras = @SY-langu
      AND t~land1 = @LC_us
    INNER JOIN t005u AS t005u
      ON  p~zland     = t005u~land1
      AND p~zregi     = t005u~bland
      AND t005u~spras = @SY-langu
    INNER JOIN t005t AS t005t
      ON  p~zland     = t005t~land1
      AND t005t~spras = @SY-langu
    LEFT OUTER JOIN acdoca AS a  ##DB_FEATURE_MODE[TABLE_LEN_MAX1]
      ON  rp~belnr = a~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = a~rbukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = a~gjahr
      AND a~rldnr = @LC_01
      AND a~blart = @LC_re
      AND a~ebeln <> @space
    WHERE p~zbukr =  @p_bukrs
    AND   p~hbkid =  @p_hbkid
    AND   p~hktid =  @p_accid
    AND   p~rzawe IN @s_paym
    AND   p~laufd IN @s_runon
    AND   p~laufi IN @s_runid
    AND   p~gjahr =  @p_gjahr
    AND   p~vblnr IN @s_paydn
    AND   p~chect IN @s_chkno
    AND ( p~kunnr IN @s_cust
     OR   p~lifnr IN @s_cust )    ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS
    BYPASSING BUFFER )
	
	SELECT 
	   laufd,  
       laufi,  
       chect,    
       zbukr,  
       pridt,    
       lifnr,  
       kunnr,  
       belnr, 
       bldat, 
       rwbtr,  
       sgtxt,  
       waers, 
       voidd,  
       shkzg, 
       vblnr,  
       zwels,
       hbkid,
       hktid,
       rzawe,
       text2,
       xblnr,
       zfbdt,
       zbd1t,
       zbd2t,
       zbd3t,
       dmbtr,
       zpstl,
       zort1,
       zstra,
       zpfac,
       landx,
       bezei,
       xbanc,
       bancd,
	   FIRST_VALUE( ebeln ) OVER( PARTITION BY belnr_aux, rbukrs_aux, gjahr_aux
                                    ORDER BY ebeln_aux DESCENDING ) AS ebeln
	FROM +table1
	INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_check).

entry.title: Re: SUM - Error password for SYSTEM does not work
entry.content: Guys here is the solution: you must to change the system password , but you must dont use a special character into the pass. example: ALTER USER SYSTEM IDENTIFIED BY ADM123gst23;

entry.title: Re: Issue Consuming OpenAPI OData from SAP Datasphere in Node.js – Access Token Returns Login Link I
entry.content: I'm also running into the same problem for Postman. I can access my token, but using the token is not outputting json. Is it some type of User permission issue in Datasphere? Or is it related to a licence? Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Become an Expert Peer for SAP Support Programs!
entry.content:
Hi, Ervin Szolke,

 

I am reaching out regarding the following SAP products:

 

SAP ERP Finance

 

SAP Upgrade

 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning Modules

 

SAP Ariba Sourcing Events

 

SAP Business Procurement Administration

 

SAP Hana

 

 

Could you please let me know how many experts are needed on your platform for the SAP products mentioned above? The reason I ask is that some of my friends have experience with these SAP products. Additionally, since it’s been three weeks since your post was made, I’d like to know if SAP's platform has already hired chat experts, or if there are still vacancies available for experts in these SAP products?

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal
entry.content:
Thanks @DavidGir I'm now able to get the proxy path which has the internal app ID generated by respective landscape / application (Thanks for tip & please accept my appreciation). 

However, this can be a workaround but not a solution. Isn't that the application should automatically route ? Some of the app, which I'm migrating from Neo to CF with its Odata path is routing properly. YAML & XS-APP.JSON are exactly same. Not sure why this routing issue is happening only with few apps. I will raise an SAP incident as well to understand what is happening here and why routing is not happening automatically over the YAML specified path + xs-app.json details. As per SAP tutorials & documentations, this should happen automatically.

For your issue - is this how you have solved and moved to Prod ? Wanted to get the view, hence asking. In the meanwhile, If SAP replies with any further insights - I will come back and update here. At present, I'm going to go with the provided workaround for timebeing.

entry.title: Re: SAP COMMERCE CLOUD SYSTEM MONITORING AND MAINTENANCE
entry.content:
Great blog

As part of CCCv2, SAP has Performance Health Check service entitlement in Std and premuim edition

How can customers use this Service. Is it via SAP for me or SAP store?

Regards

entry.title: Re: PReq release from SBWP link goes to ME53N , NOT ME54N
entry.content: not sure why but in abap RSWUEXEC method EXECUTEMETHODE ( object type BWFUTLCALL ) it is determining to execute the DEFAULT method

entry.title: Re: Assistance Needed with URL Mashup App Error in SAP B1...
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

Would you add your SAP Business One Web client domain as a trusted domain with reference to the Configure Security Settings?

The Trusted domain in BTP Subaccount serves as the frame-ancestors directive in the Content Security Policy (CSP) of Fiori applications. Add the domain of the SAP Business One Web Client, which embeds Fiori applications within an iframe, to the Trusted Domain settings in your BTP subaccount.  

FYI, from SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2305, the Web client introduced CSP to further enhance its security. The Default CSP settings, with its frame-src configuration, allow embedding Fiori applications from the domain *.hana.ondemand.com. in your case, you don't need to change this default CSP settings.

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: Re: PReq release from SBWP link goes to ME53N , NOT ME54N
entry.content: Here in lv_context_handle->element_get   name =  "IM_EXECUTION_SERVICE".  This gives back 0002 which then causes the default method to execute  ( which is display for BUS2009 )

Best regards.

Does anyone know where ER diagram of it is?

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content: Solution for this Issue:Your BTP sub account should not be trial account. If you attempt creating APIM instance with trial account, the attempt is rejected.

entry.title: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
entry.content:
While I am changing PO price at ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM with code like followed, but the price will be changed after check(save) button clicked.

    DATA: lt_pr1      TYPE mmpur_tkomv.
    CALL METHOD im_item->get_conditions
      IMPORTING
        ex_conditions = lt_pr1.

    READ TABLE lt_pr1 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<pr1>) WITH KEY kschl = 'PB00'.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      <pr1>-kbetr = <pr1>-kposn.
      CALL METHOD im_item->set_conditions
        EXPORTING
          im_conditions = lt_pr1.
    ENDIF.

as the code , I succeed change price of item 10 to 10, and item 20 to 20; but after I saved it or clicked the check button, the price of item 20 will be changed to 10

entry.title: Re: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
entry.content: This question has been bothering me for a long time and I cannot find the answer. I am grateful for someone who can guide me

entry.title: Re: Connection between OCRT and OINV (SAP B1)
entry.content:
Hi @barbaragalantin ,

SELECT T0."DocNum",T0."InvoiceId",T0."DocEntry",T0."InvType",T0."SumApplied",T1."DocEntry",T1."DocNum"
FROM RCT2 T0
INNER JOIN OINV T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" AND T0."InvType" = T1."ObjType";

I have tried this query in 5 different localisation SBO companies and each one gives me the correct result.
Could you please try this one or share the one you have prepared?

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: How to provide default date with cap actions
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have custom action in CAP, Any way to default initial date to first day of the month and Final Date to last day of the month?

 
  action updateInvoices
(InitialDate : Date  @Common.Label:'Start Date'  @mandatory,
  FinalDate : Date  @Common.Label:'End Date'  @mandatory)

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content:
Hi hagit

i see nobody picked this up, so let me try to help you. Obviously you know that the code miss an endif AND there is no output of any kind as the code is uploaded to an abap system. My idea is that, good you reached the soap url with correct login and password but what ever soap you are contacting has some format (at least) requirement in the payload that you are not passing through your code. hope this helps! A

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal

We also have other apps that did not present this issue. I would also be interested to know the solution.

entry.title: Re: I want to Verify the Account at the time of account c...

Hi @Rvanjari It could depends on how you would like to verify the customer accounts, you can leverage the Identity Verification policies. 

If you wanted to implement more advanced custom verification logics, you can try out the CDC extensions to host your own endpoints.

entry.content: When do you want the price change to happen. Does it happen on save.

entry.title: FRUN: Long running job issue
entry.content:
Hi Team,
In job monitoring use case we can't be able to monitoring the long running jobs .
please help us with how to configure the long running jobs in sap focused run and how the alerts may triggered.
Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FRUN: Long running job issue
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The "Analysis" & "Trend Graphs" & "Alert" functionalities in the Job & Automation Monitoring can be used to monitor the long running jobs. 

  • which are the long running jobs and check if they deteriorate
  • for a job, if there are times with high run time or high failure rate
  • if periodic jobs have overlapping/parallel executions
  • The alert type "Critical Runtime": The event is raised if the run time of a job execution exceeds the threshold set by you.

For more detailed information, please see https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/job-and-automation-monitoring.html.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang 

  •

entry.title: SuccessFactors Contingent Workers for Compliance Purposes
entry.content:
hello all, good day, 

Due to the need of segregating all Non Employees in SF instance solely for compliance purpose, we have activated the CW feature in our instance & activated "Is Contingent Worker" flag which is now visible in <Employment Details> portlet as a "Yes/No" field - Without implementing other CW full-suite setup such as configuring new CW Person Type specific business configurations, CW new hire template, Work Order configuration & setup, etc. We only have activated the "Is contingent worker" flag under employment details and nothing else because we only want to use the flag to differentiate regular employees vs non-employees.

Query 1:

Will sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without the full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes" classify these staffs as CW worker & No longer classify as regular staffs?

Query 2:

Is this the same flag that is checked in BIB replication configuration for inclusive / exclusive of Contingent Workers under xxxxxxxxxxxxx in SAP ECC??

Query 3:

will sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes" for the non-employees auto disable all other modules such as time off (leaves application), Timesheet & Payroll as if full suite CW setup are in place?? If No, any other way / configurations / switches to disable unwanted modules not needed for CW workers? If yes, wat are all other modules that will be auto disabled?

Query 4:

With sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes", are employmentInfo & JobInfo are the minimal 2 portlets that must be maintained? any other portlets that are mandatory and must be maintained to ensure proper classification of CW.

Thanks all for your time, Appreciate reading my post.

entry.title: Offsetting Account determination of financial document
entry.content:
Hi All,

As I know, there is logic for determinate the offsetting account of financial document. It will take the largest value of it's corresponding side. (Credit -> Debit,   Debit -> Credit)

 

 

But is it possible to get the offsetting account by the same amount in corresponding side?

which like the pairing below instead of mapping to itself.

however the figure is not rounding up in the table 

* For your information, I'm actually using restricted account to capture Tonnage figure

entry.title: 部署異動したS-USERをCloud Adminitoratorから外したい
entry.content:
S-user xxx が本システムのCloud Administratorになっていますが、部署異動したため、本システムを利用することはなくなりました。本システムのCloud Administratorから除外するにはどのようにすればよいでしょうか？S-USERは別のシステムで使用しているため、削除したくありません。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 部署異動したS-USERをCloud Adminitoratorから外したい
entry.content:
管理者によって、既存のCloud AdministratorのSユーザから以下の二つの権限を削除することで、
既存のCloud AdministratorのSユーザは一般ユーザに降格されます。 

  • ユーザデータ編集
  • 権限編集

具体的な手順は、以下の通りです。  

1.S ユーザ管理 - SAP for Me で変更予定のSユーザを選択します。

2.当該ユーザの管理画面が表示されたら、編集ボタン（鉛筆アイコン）をクリックします。

3.User Data 配下にある「ユーザデータ編集」と「権限編集」を削除します。

3.「保存」をクリックします。

詳細については、下記のKBAに記載がございますので、ご参照ください。

2596214 - How to maintain Super, Cloud, and User Administrator S-user IDs listed in My Important Contacts - SAP for Me

How to remove an administrator

  • To remove an administrator status from an S-user ID, another administrator must remove authorizations from the S-user ID (specifically the two listed above). Tip: See KBA 2492132 to understand which authorization(s) to remove.

1660828 - How to delete authorizations from an S-user ID - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
Re: How to send EWM Goods Issue from DM API
entry.content:
Hi okakoshow,

I think it depends on your specific use case. The goods issue API in WIP Activities is the EWM WIP Goods Issue API which works only in WIP scenarios. For more information, see EWM WIP Handling.

If you want to post general EWM GI, it's recommended to use below goods issue API which works for both IM and EWM cases:

Best,
Jielinx

entry.title: Re: how to extend Api and have the custom field's value p...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can go to check if there is a BAdI can change the value of custom fields with your related business context. If can, read the KONH-KOSRT field from CDS View, then change the value of your custom field.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Can I get SAPB1 to working with MSSQL 2022?
entry.content: I don't think there is a way out. You don't get a SQL 2022 selection on the SAP installer (Speaking as of SAP v10 SP 2408), 12th Nov 2024.

entry.title: How to to upload multiple image files in SAP RAP Application?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to upload multiple image files in the SAP RAP Application, but currently, I can only upload them one by one.

Is it possible to upload multiple files at once? If so, how can I achieve this?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: How to delete not-existing objects on a cloud system?
entry.content: Hi barisguler, This occurs when the service binding object is not created or imported properly. This can only be resolved by SRVB team but changing values during debugging session, You need to create an incident in the component BC-DWB-AIE-SRB.

entry.title: Re: How to delete not-existing objects on a cloud system?
entry.content:
Hi @barisguler, This occurs when the service binding object is not created or imported properly. This can only be resolved by SRVB team but changing values during debugging session, You need to create an incident in the component BC-DWB-AIE-SRB.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Arun

entry.title: Re: How to delete not-existing objects on a cloud system?
entry.content:
Hi @barisguler , This occurs when the service binding object is not created or imported properly. This can only be resolved by SRVB team but changing values during debugging session, You need to create an incident in the component BC-DWB-AIE-SRB.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Arun

entry.title: No sales orders appearing in Manage Documented Credit Decisions
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are following the Tutorial - Credit Management. We need help in completing the section "Reviewing and Releasing Sales Orders in Manage Documented Credit Decisions" in our S/4HANA Cloud environment. We don't have any cases in our environment. Can you please help on how to create and complete the process?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No sales orders appearing in Manage Documented Credit...
entry.content:
Hey there,

If your issue is "no sales orders are credit-blocked", please firstly check Video Tutorial: Receivables Management - How to Enable SAP Credit Management for Sales to see whether all necessary configurations have been done to enable SAP Credit Management for Sales.

If there are credit-blocked sales order but these sales orders don't appear in the Manage Documented Credit Decisions app, please raise a ticket to component FIN-FIO-CCD-CR, with the ID of the blocked sales order. Then FIN experts will look into the issue further.

Learning resources:

  • Video Tutorial: Receivables Management - How to Enable SAP Credit Management for Sales
  • Product Assistance for SAP Credit Management
  • Help Documentation - SAP Credit Management (FIN-FSCM-CR)
  • SAP Credit Management (FIN-FSCM-CR) - Apps for Credit Management

Thanks and Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to send EWM Goods Issue from DM API
entry.content: Hi Jielinx, However I use production order, not process order. So I thought I couldn't use that API. Is my understanding correct? Best, okakoshow

entry.title: Re: How to send EWM Goods Issue from DM API
entry.content:
Hi Jielinx,

However I use production order, not process order.

So I thought I couldn't use that API.

Is my understanding correct?

Best, okakoshow

entry.title: Re: How to send EWM Goods Issue from DM API
entry.content:
Hi okakoshow,

This API actually works for both process orders and production orders. But I noticed that you want an API that works the same way as the Work Center POD, then you may try the one in the Assembly API package: POST /assembledComponents. It's for production orders only.

Best,
Jielinx

entry.title: Re: How to to upload multiple image files in SAP RAP Appl...
entry.content:
@Andynguyen wrote:

Dear Experts,

I need to upload multiple image files in the SAP RAP Application, but currently, I can only upload them one by one.

Is it possible to upload multiple files at once? If so, how can I achieve this?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

 

Hello,
Yes, it's possible to upload multiple files at once in the SAP RAP Application. You can achieve this by using the OData streams feature introduced in the latest SAP BTP ABAP 2208 release. This allows you to handle large objects like images more efficiently. international ring sizing

Best Regards,
Sonia Lewis

entry.title: Re: Two versions of Crystal within same VS Solution
entry.content:
The problem is CRAXDDRT.dll is ONLY integrated into Visual Studio, you can't distribute it.

I believe CR 9 or 10 was the last supported RDC Engine.

So the problem you are going to have is side by side using CR 10 CRAXDDRT and SP 36 .NET runtime since you can't distribute CRAXDDRT with the current version of runtime.

The problem with going back to CR 10 .NET is it's no longer supported in current versions of the framework.

For the amount of time trying to get it to work I would suggest working on .NET only and leave the old embedded part in the old app.

entry.title: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi

We are looking at steps involved to send the attachment from an external application through Service layer,

The business case is as below

The Sales Quotation API is pushed from a SFA tool where the SQ in SAP B1 is created and the attachment captured in the SFA tool has to be pushed to the Attachment folder and map the same to the SQ Created.

Note that the Environment is on SAP B1 CCC and the attachment folders are in windows machine

We tried the b1/v1/Attachment2 but we are not getting clear logic steps involved to send the attachment from external app to our attachment folder and then map that to the SQ

if any one can help out on the steps it would be of great help

entry.title: HANA Model Management Menu not Visible
entry.content:
Hi

We recently upgraded the DB to Version 10 FP2405 and enabled the analytics in CCC, but the HANA model management menu is not visible and also the excel interactive is not visible, we have tried the note 3250985 and re initialized many times but of no use, Has any one come across this and fixed it

Thanks in advance

The issue has been resolved.

While trying to link recipe to PPM item I am facing a issue where when I click on Find button and search recipes it does not show the name of the recipe. However, once the recipe is linked it displays the recipe name.

could you please help me with this.

 

 

below it shows the recipe name.

 

Regards

Vishwas TN

entry.title: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1709?
entry.content:
We have a requirement that at the end of every month we need to close the MM & FI period with some scheduler but the same period should be open for the specific users (i.e. Finance & Accounts team members) which again to be closed on 8th of every month.

Is there any default configuration available in SAP?

entry.title: Automatically Reassign Users to Another Class/Item in SAP SF LMS after Failed Attempt
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have a scenario in SAP SuccessFactors LMS where a user has been relegated due to failing an attempt in a particular class. Is there a way to automatically reassign or enroll this user into another class or item?

Specifically, I am looking for insights on the following:

Automatic Assignment: Is there a standard SAP SF LMS feature that allows a user to be automatically placed into a different class or training item after they fail a given attempt?

Workflows/Triggers: Can workflows or any automated triggers be configured to enroll the user into another class based on their failure status?

Custom Configuration: If this functionality is not available out of the box, what customization options exist to achieve this behavior (e.g., using SAP SuccessFactors APIs, Business Rules, etc.)?

entry.title: Re: New My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2208 – Deep Dive
entry.content:
Hi,

The customer cannot seem to see the "My Home Settings". Is there a setup needed to make it appear on their user setting?

entry.title: Re: Inbound Process Putaway by Warehouse Order using RFUI
entry.content:
Hi Prasanna,

Thanks for sharing the Inbound Process Putaway by Warehouse Order using RFUI, its very informative.

Thanks,

Jayanth

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error During MDK Project Deployment o...
entry.content:
@Jitendra_Kansal
Thanks a lot for sharing this solution,  I was able to access the MDK web app just as you explained. Really appreciate your help and the clear guidance!

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content: Hi @nicoschoenteich i will follow the guided development steps in VS code.

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - creating a CRUD application
entry.content: The interoperability issue has been resolved by CAP, so the workaround is no longer required. Hence, I've removed the workaround.

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content:
Hi @junwu here is the code generated by the guided development and service as the northwind v2 service

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="progressvieQ">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Path="UnitsInStock" Property="Value"/>
<PropertyValue Int="100" Property="TargetValue"/>
<PropertyValue EnumMember="UI.VisualizationType/Progress" Property="Visualization"/>
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductName"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productname}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitPrice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitprise}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsInStock"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitinstock}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsOnOrder"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitsonorder}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Low"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SupplierID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>supplierid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>categoryid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="UnitPrice Chart"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.Chart#columnchart"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>progressive}"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Progressvice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: btp - launch another program xml
entry.content:
If I click the 'Node1' menu on the project1 screen, I hope the project2 program's screen will be displayed.

The file structure is as shown in the picture.

 

My screen now looks like this.

I don't know if the routing setting in manifest.json is wrong, or if something else is wrong.
Currently, when I click the menu in project1, the xml screen of project2 does not appear.

How can I solve this problem?
Please look at my xml, controller, and manifest below and let me know if there are any mistakes.

<Project1>
1. Main.view.xml

<mvc:View

    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"

    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"

    xmlns="sap.m"

    controllerName="project1.ext.main.Main"

>

    <Page id="Main" title="Tree Menu">

        <content>

            <SplitApp id="SplitAppDemo">

                <masterPages>

                    <Page id="master" title="Tree Structure Menu">

                        <Tree id="Tree" items="{tree>/nodes}">

                            <StandardTreeItem

                                id="StandardTreeItem"

                                title="{tree>text}"

                                icon="{tree>ref}"

                                type="Active"

                                press=".onTreeItemPress"

                            />

                        </Tree>

                    </Page>

                </masterPages>

            </SplitApp>

        </content>

    </Page>

</mvc:View>

2. Main.controller.js

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/fe/core/PageController',
        'sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel',
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/XMLView'
    ],
    function(PageController, JSONModel, XMLView) {
        'use strict';
        return PageController.extend('project1.ext.main.Main', {
            onInit: function () {
                // JSON 모델에 트리 데이터 설정
                var oTreeData = new JSONModel({
                    nodes: [
                        {
                            "text": "Node1",
                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-audio",
                            "nodes": [
                                {
                                    "text": "Node1-1",
                                    "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-e-pub",
                                    "nodes": [
                                        {
                                            "text": "Node1-1-1",
                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-html"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "text": "Node1-1-2",
                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-photo",
                                            "nodes": [
                                                {
                                                    "text": "Node1-1-2-1",
                                                    "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-text-file",
                                                    "nodes": [
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-1",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-video"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-2",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-zip-file"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-3",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://course-program"
                                                        }]}]}]},
                                {
                                    "text": "Node1-2",
                                    "ref": "sap-icon://create"
                                }]},
                        {
                            "text": "Node2",
                            "ref": "sap-icon://customer-financial-fact-sheet"
                        }]});

                // 모델을 현재 View에 설정하여 바인딩할 수 있게 함
                this.getView().setModel(oTreeData, "tree");
           },
            onTreeItemPress: function (oEvent) {
                var oSplitApp = this.byId("SplitAppDemo");
                var sItemText = oEvent.getSource().getTitle();
                console.log("aaaaaaaaaaaaa");
                // project2 화면으로 전환
                if (sItemText === "Node1" || sItemText === "Node2") {
                    console.log("bbbbbbbbbb");
                    // project2 뷰가 로드된 적이 없을 경우에만 로드
                    if (!this._project2View) {
                        console.log("ccccccccccccc");
                        XMLView.create({
                            viewName: "project2.ext.main.Main"
                        }).then(function(oView) {
                            console.log("ddddddddddddd");
                            this._project2View = oView;
                            oSplitApp.addDetailPage(oView);
                            oSplitApp.toDetail(oView);
                        }.bind(this));
                    } else {
                        oSplitApp.toDetail(this._project2View);
                    }}}});});

3. manifest.json

{
"_version": "1.59.0",
"sap.app": {
"id": "project1",
"type": "application",
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
"applicationVersion": {
"version": "0.0.1"
},
"title": "{{appTitle}}",
"description": "{{appDescription}}",
"resources": "resources.json",
"sourceTemplate": {
"id": "@sap/generator-fiori:fpm",
"version": "1.13.0",
"toolsId": "458009ce-b1aa-445c-a874-3b09dfbfd21d"
},
"dataSources": {
"mainService": {
"uri": "/odata/v4/code/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "4.0"
}}}},
"sap.ui": {
"technology": "UI5",
"icons": {
"icon": "",
"favIcon": "",
"phone": "",
"phone@2": "",
"tablet": "",
"tablet@2": ""
},
"deviceTypes": {
"desktop": true,
"tablet": true,
"phone": true
}},
"sap.ui5": {
"flexEnabled": true,
"dependencies": {
"minUI5Version": "1.130.0",
"libs": {
"sap.m": {},
"sap.ui.core": {},
"sap.ushell": {},
"sap.fe.templates": {}
}},
"contentDensities": {
"compact": true,
"cozy": true
},
"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "project1.i18n.i18n"
}},
"": {
"dataSource": "mainService",
"preload": true,
"settings": {
"synchronizationMode": "None",
"operationMode": "Server",
"autoExpandSelect": true,
"earlyRequests": true
}},
"@i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}},
"resources": {
"css": []
},
"routing": {
"config": {
"routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project1.ext.main", 
"controlAggregation": "pages",
"async": true
},
"routes": [
{
"name": "MasterCodesMain",
"pattern": ":?query:",
"target": "MasterCodesMain"
},
{
"name": "project2Route",
"pattern": "project2",
"target": "project2View"
}
],
"targets": {
"MasterCodesMain": {
"type": "Component",
"id": "MasterCodesMain",
"name": "sap.fe.core.fpm",
"options": {
"settings": {
"viewName": "project1.ext.main.Main",
"contextPath": "/MasterCodes"
}
}
},
"project2View": {
"viewName": "Main",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main",
"viewType": "XML",
"controlAggregation": "detailPages",
"controlId": "SplitAppDemo"
}}}}}

 

 

<Project2>
1. Main.view.xml

<mvc:View
xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
xmlns="sap.m"
xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros"
xmlns:html="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"
controllerName="project2.ext.main.Main">
<Page id="Main" title="{i18n>MainTitle}">
<content>
<Text text="123456789" id="Text1"/>
</content>
</Page>
</mvc:View>

 2. manifest.json

{
"_version": "1.59.0",
"sap.app": {
"id": "project2",
"type": "application",
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
"applicationVersion": {
"version": "0.0.1"
},
"title": "{{appTitle}}",
"description": "{{appDescription}}",
"resources": "resources.json",
"sourceTemplate": {
"id": "@sap/generator-fiori:fpm",
"version": "1.13.0",
"toolsId": "dc1af02f-f6ab-4b49-878f-663afba60b68"
},
"dataSources": {
"mainService": {
"uri": "/odata/v4/code/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "4.0"
}}}},
"sap.ui": {
"technology": "UI5",
"icons": {
"icon": "",
"favIcon": "",
"phone": "",
"phone@2": "",
"tablet": "",
"tablet@2": ""
},
"deviceTypes": {
"desktop": true,
"tablet": true,
"phone": true
}
},
"sap.ui5": {
"flexEnabled": true,
"dependencies": {
"minUI5Version": "1.130.0",
"libs": {
"sap.m": {},
"sap.ui.core": {},
"sap.ushell": {},
"sap.fe.templates": {}
}
},
"contentDensities": {
"compact": true,
"cozy": true
},
"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "project2.i18n.i18n"
}
},
"": {
"dataSource": "mainService",
"preload": true,
"settings": {
"synchronizationMode": "None",
"operationMode": "Server",
"autoExpandSelect": true,
"earlyRequests": true
}
},
"@i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
"resources": {
"css": []
},
"routing": {
"config": {
"routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main.Main", 
"controlId": "app", 
"controlAggregation": "pages",
"async": true
},
"routes": [
{
"name": "project2Main",
"pattern": "",
"target": "project2View"
} ],
"targets": {
"project2View": {
"viewName": "Main",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main.Main",
"controlAggregation": "pages"
}}}}}

entry.title: What function does the administrator perform in the 'Mass decline/complete fors' menu?
entry.content:
Hello,

I wonder the 'Mass decline/complete forms' function for 360 review.

I decline the 360 review document in 'Inbox' from the 'Mass decline/complete fors' menu, and there was no difference.

@MASS decline/complete forms

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content:
Hi @junwu i am developing list report page, service as a northwind v2 service and through guided development in VS Code, here is the code

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="progressvieQ">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Path="UnitsInStock" Property="Value"/>
<PropertyValue Int="100" Property="TargetValue"/>
<PropertyValue EnumMember="UI.VisualizationType/Progress" Property="Visualization"/>
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

 

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductName"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productname}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitPrice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitprise}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsInStock"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitinstock}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsOnOrder"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitsonorder}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Low"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SupplierID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>supplierid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>categoryid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="UnitPrice Chart"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.Chart#columnchart"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>progressive}"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Progressvice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: Report shipping error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

When i am trying to generate MSDS reports in CG54, i am getting the error as below attached image.

please help me with a solution

entry.title: btp - Error in xml not appearing
entry.content:
The file structure is as shown in the picture.

 

My screen now looks like this.

Currently, if I click the menu in project1, the xml screen of project2 does not appear and there is no response.
I hope that when I click the menu in project1, the xml of project2 will be displayed.
I don't know if it went wrong in the manifest or somewhere else,
Please look at my xml, controller, and manifest below and let me know if there are any mistakes.

I attached the files as txt files. Please refer to this.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Restful Application Programming Model (RAP), ABAP RAP File Upload Large Objects (LOB)
entry.content:
Dear Abhishek,

Thanks for sharing,

Is this possible to select multiple files to upload at once? If so, how can I achieve this? Thanks

entry.title: SKF linked with LIS
entry.content:
I was trying to transfer the activity quantities booked in process order to the SKF created by establishing the link. in S4 hana system i need the process and explanation .

kindly please share me the details and theory about the SKF link to LIS. 

Thanx & Regards ,

Chendurapu Reddy.

entry.title: Re: Where-used list for manage global hierarchies
entry.content: Question forwarded to the expert. Hope it can be answered soon.

entry.title: Re: Single Delivery from Multiple Sales Order
entry.content: thnks, its fine solution working properly

entry.title: SAP Security Patch Day – November 2024
entry.content:
Introduction

November 2024 brings critical updates for SAP systems worldwide with the release of new security patches addressing various vulnerabilities. This report provides a comprehensive analysis of the latest SAP security notes, their potential impact, and recommendations for maintaining a robust security posture.

Overview of November 2024 SAP Security Patches

This month, SAP has released a total of 10 security notes, including updates to existing ones. Notably, there are two high-priority patches that demand immediate attention from SAP administrators and security professionals.

Patch Breakdown:

  • High Priority: 2 patches
  • Medium Priority: 6 patches
  • Low Priority: 2 patches

Detailed Analysis of Key Security Notes

High Priority Patches

Note 3520281 – [CVE-2024-47590] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in SAP Web Dispatcher

Severity: High
CVSS Score: 8.8
Affected Component: SAP Web Dispatcher

Description:

A critical Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in SAP Web Dispatcher. An unauthenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability to inject malicious scripts into the web interface, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or manipulation. Immediate patching is essential to protect the integrity and confidentiality of your SAP systems.

Note 3483344 – [CVE-2024-39592] Missing Authorization Check in SAP PDCE

Severity: High
CVSS Score: 7.7
Affected Component: SAP PDCE (Personnel Development and Capability Evaluation)

Description:

A missing authorization check in SAP PDCE could allow an authenticated attacker with low privileges to access sensitive data or perform unauthorized operations. Organizations utilizing SAP PDCE should apply this patch promptly to prevent potential data breaches and maintain compliance with security policies.

Medium Priority Patches

Note 3335394 – [CVE-2024-42372] Missing Authorization Check in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 6.5
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)

Description:

This vulnerability involves missing authorization checks that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to access sensitive functions within the System Landscape Directory. Applying this patch is crucial to close the security gap and protect your system's integrity.

Note 3509619 – [CVE-2024-47595] Local Privilege Escalation in SAP Host Agent

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 6.3
Affected Component: SAP Host Agent

Description:

A local privilege escalation vulnerability exists in SAP Host Agent. An attacker with local access and limited privileges could exploit this vulnerability to gain elevated privileges on the system. Timely application of this patch will prevent unauthorized privilege escalation and potential system compromise.

Note 3393899 – [CVE-2024-47592] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 5.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)

Description:

This vulnerability could allow an attacker to access sensitive information without proper authorization by exploiting the logon application. Patching this vulnerability will help prevent unauthorized data access and potential information leaks.

Note 3504390 – [CVE-2024-47586] NULL Pointer Dereference Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 5.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Description:

A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability could lead to a denial-of-service condition, causing the system to crash or become unresponsive. Applying this patch is important to ensure system stability and availability.

Note 3522953 – [CVE-2024-47588] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 4.7
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)

Description:

This vulnerability may expose sensitive information during the software update process. Implementing the provided patch will safeguard against unauthorized data disclosure and enhance the security of your update procedures.

Note 3508947 – [CVE-2024-47593] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 4.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Description:

An information disclosure vulnerability that could allow unauthorized access to sensitive data within the system. Patching this vulnerability is recommended to maintain data confidentiality and prevent potential exploitation.

Low Priority Patches

Note 3498470 – [CVE-2024-47587] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)

Severity: Low
CVSS Score: 3.5
Affected Component: SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)

Description:

A missing authorization check could potentially allow unauthorized users to access specific functionalities within Cash Operations. Applying this patch will enhance security controls and prevent unauthorized transactions or data access.

Note 3392049 – [CVE-2024-33000] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Bank Account Management

Severity: Low
CVSS Score: 3.5
Affected Component: SAP Bank Account Management

Description:

This vulnerability may allow unauthorized users to access sensitive bank account information due to missing authorization checks. It is advisable to apply the patch to prevent unauthorized access and ensure compliance with financial data protection regulations.

The Importance of Timely Patch Management

The November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day highlights the ongoing need for proactive security measures within SAP environments. Unpatched vulnerabilities are a primary attack vector for cybercriminals, making prompt and effective patch management essential for minimizing security risks.

Complete List of November 2024 SAP Security Notes

Note# Title Priority CVSS Score

3520281[CVE-2024-47590] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in SAP Web DispatcherHigh8.8
3483344[CVE-2024-39592] Missing Authorization Check in SAP PDCEHigh7.7
3335394[CVE-2024-42372] Missing Authorization Check in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)Medium6.5
3509619[CVE-2024-47595] Local Privilege Escalation in SAP Host AgentMedium6.3
3393899[CVE-2024-47592] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)Medium5.3
3504390[CVE-2024-47586] NULL Pointer Dereference Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP PlatformMedium5.3
3522953[CVE-2024-47588] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)Medium4.7
3508947[CVE-2024-47593] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP PlatformMedium4.3
3498470[CVE-2024-47587] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)Low3.5
3392049[CVE-2024-33000] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Bank Account ManagementLow3.5

This list provides a clear overview of all security notes released in the November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day. It is crucial to review each note and assess its relevance to your SAP environment.

Conclusion

The November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day underscores the critical importance of maintaining vigilant security practices within SAP landscapes. By staying informed about these vulnerabilities and promptly applying the necessary patches, organizations can significantly reduce their risk exposure and maintain robust system security.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Partner Function Configuration in Action D...
entry.content: Hi Jisna, I think that's standard behavior for ChaRM transaction. If you need to send email to multiple business partners for one partner function, customization may be needed here. Thus, SAP consulting team may be a proper choice for you. Thanks, Shawn

entry.title: Re: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi @SachinBG ,

First create the sales document.

Now upload the attachments in Attachment2.

Upon successful upload, you will receive the Absolute Entry.

Update the sales document with the Absolute Entry.

The sales document is updated in SAP B1 with attachments.

 

This is I have done through Postman, you can do with your program also.

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Where-used list for manage global hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use review booklet apps to display, analyze and validate data. 

Please checked following Help Portal Documentation about  review booklets,

Review Booklets | SAP Help Portal

Hope it helps.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Query execution time taking too long in OIBT Table
entry.content:
Experts,

When we are using "Select Top 10" in OIBT table, Its take more than 3 mins to execute the query. How to overcome this issue. Kindly guide us with the solution ASAP. Enclosed image FYR.

entry.title: Re: Remove Version from table
entry.content:
Hello Nikhil,

In case of Account based model we are able to remove the version , But in case of Measure based model where in dimension is not an account, We are unable to remove it . Are we missing any setting. 

Many Thanks 

Akshay Bhandari

entry.title: Ai Assisted Skill Match
entry.content:
Hello,

So in the recent 2H2024 release, there is a skill compatibility match in the new applicant workbench. SAP mentioned that the skills will be classified as primary skills, secondary skills, other applicant skills but when I tested, I was able to see only the exact matched and unmatched skills.

How exactly does this works and is there any specific settings that need to enables in order to see the classification of skills? How does this feature helps recruiters in screening?

Thanks, and Regards

Avinesh Sundar

entry.title: Sap Webi calculate the first and last assessments in the same day
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I have multiple assessments on the same day as (weight, blood pressure),

and I want to focus only on the first and last assessment of the day. see the first picture.

 

additionally, I want another formula to calculate the (height assessment) once for patient. see the second picture. there are 3 assessments for 1 patient, how to calculate it as once?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Type ERROR:Cannot read properties of undefined (readi...
entry.content: Hi @junwu it is a northwind oData v2 service

entry.title: Re: A Complete Tutorial on OData-Based Adobe Forms for SAP Purchase Orders
entry.content: Hi @AshishPrasad1, You can add the package details (Refer : D - Step 2 {while changing the odata service}) in custom template (which is copy of standard) and save all the details. Then it will ask for TR to lock the object.

entry.title: Re: Handling Group Goals in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
Good day all

Do you know if we are able to delete the goals if the upgrade process has already started?

Greetings
Barend

entry.title: where is The CK53N error log
entry.content:
Dear Consultant:

   I want to make a report show The CK53N error log,

please help me find to CK53N error log put place?

thanks...

entry.title: Re: Query execution time taking too long in OIBT Table
entry.content:
Hi @rmpal ,

Could you check your available memory when running this query?

At one of our clients, we found that the issue was caused by the SAP HANA Engine License Peak Memory reaching its limit. After increasing the memory to 128GB, the OIBT view ran without any issues.

Since the OIBT view can be slow, I usually prefer using the OITL, ITL1, and OBTN tables.

Depending on the requirements, I join these with transaction tables like OINV, OIGN, OPCH, etc.

What specifically are you planning to use the OIBT view for?

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Handling Group Goals in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
Good day @Srivatsa87 

I am struggling with the same issue, how were you able to get past the "You can’t import group goals using Import Performance Goals in the latest Goal Management." error?

Greetings
Barend

entry.title: How can we use cloud identity service or custom Idp on local SAP btp?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have created a full stack CAP application with node.js with having XSUAA authentication.
Also have use Cloud identity service by which multiple user can login with their credential and use my app.
I have deployed my app and its working fine.
Any user on visiting the url it ask for idp login.

it we select custom then it redirect to custom idp login page.

SO i want to do same thing on the local sap btp at development level.
For that if i run the project locally with the command:
cds watch --profile hybrid and 
cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router (it is required because i declare auth type xsuaa )

It directly login with my default identity provider and

i want that it will ask to login with custom idp login on local sap btp at the development phase.

Thank you..

entry.title: Re: MD04 showing duplicate both poitem and order ack AB
entry.content:
Hi,

This is because you insert an illegal AB data, you should refresh it after insert.

you can try manually insert an AB, system will auto calculate the reduce qty, then it will be fine in MD04.

entry.title: Re: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1...
entry.content:
Hello @0018280030 

MM period can be closed with the MMPV transaction. It can be scheduled as a monthly background job to close periods automatically. 

If you need to still to post to a closed (previous) period, you can enable that with MMRV. However that can be user dependent, i.e. a period is either closed or not, posting to the previous period is either allowed or not. That can't be limited based on user ids.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and...
entry.content: I found a simpler solution

entry.title: Re: Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi, Actually i am also facing same issue and i have tried all the SNOTE that are mentioned in the post

2525367 - Purchase requisition details in My inbox app - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for Me

2898917 - Purchase Requisition details do not load in My Inbox app - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for Me

3214647 - Item details are missing for Purchasing documents in My Inbox App - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for ...

3436696 - Requisitioner field is not showing in My Inbox app for Purchase Requisitions - SAP for M

i am working on standard workflow WS20000077 and maintained the Visualization parameter for the TASK TS200000159  in the T-code SWFVISU.

If you have resolved the issue let me know.

Visualization parameter:

ITEM DETAIL MISSING

ITEM DETAIL MISSING

entry.title: Re: Issue with MD04 - empty MRP element type Column
entry.content:
Hello Mani,  While i looking at given screenshot I understand that, POitem (PO item) related MRP element is missing and it may be due to schedule line item table data inconsistency. If this is case you can please this note 2044484 - Troubleshoot to EKET, EKES, EKBE table inconsistencies - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA to fix the issue in table.

Also you can check if there any discrepancy in MRP element list in OMD5.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: How to use and deploy Cloud foundry task on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

This is my second post about cloud foundry task.
First post link: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-create-custom-cloud-foundry-tasks-in-sap-btp/qaq-p/13933513 
This post is extension of previous.

Cloud foundry Tasks : 
A task is an app or script, the code of which is included as part of a deployed app, but runs independently in its own container.

I have created a custom js file in which have business logic to implement some operation.
In mta file i do some change by following these articles:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/deploying-content-with-cf-task-execution
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/mta-deployment-descriptor-examples

Under tasks>myBackgroundTask.js have some business logic.

After doing these changes i have deployed the app.

task-auto-mta1 is one my created CF tasks but it get error after the start.

Anyone please guide me to do further.

Thank you.
